# redpanda_group (Resource)

A Redpanda Cloud group for group-based access control (GBAC).

Creates a Group in the Redpanda Cloud that can be used with role bindings to manage access control.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the group. Changing the name requires replacing the group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the group

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the group

## Usage

```terraform
resource "redpanda_group" "test_engineering" {
  name        = "gbac-test-engineering"
  description = "Test engineering team group"
}

# Bind a role to the group at cluster scope
resource "redpanda_role_binding" "cluster_access" {
  role_name           = "editor"
  account_id          = redpanda_group.test_engineering.id
  scope_resource_type = "cluster"
  scope_resource_id   = redpanda_cluster.test.id
}
```

## Import

```shell
terraform import redpanda_group.example groupId
```
